commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

Fix fetchVehicles to access response.data for vehicle details

The API wraps vehicle detail in a data object. Without .data,
model and imageUrl were undefined (model was backfilled elsewhere).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(viewer): use host pane dimensions for vt100 parser to fix display alignment

tmux capture-pane -p -e outputs pre-formatted text with hard newlines at
the host's pane width. Replaying through a vt100 parser sized to the
viewer's widget caused wrong line wraps and offset rendering. Now the
parser uses the host's cols/rows so content structure is preserved, and
the renderer clips to the viewer's available width/height (showing the
bottom portion when the viewer is shorter).

commit.message:
Fix: Pause spray during DTLS handshake to prevent candidate pair churn

Spray injects 41 new ICE candidates every 3s, creating new pairs that
compete with the ongoing DTLS handshake. DTLS requires multiple stable
round-trips but the continuous flood of new pairs prevents completion.
Caller cycles connecting→failed, callee stuck in connecting forever.

Fix: Skip spray rounds when connectionState === 'connecting' (DTLS in
progress). Resume if it falls back to 'failed'. Applied to all three
spray locations (caller, callee startCalleeSpray, callee acceptCall).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Search coverage fix + dedup performance refactor

  taxonomy") — was reducing results from ~5,800 to ~250

commit.message:
Tune chord detection: reduce cycling, improve lock rate

Progress bar cycling (0→99%→0 loop):
- Silent-frame reset threshold 4→12 frames (~1.8 s) so normal guitar
  note decay doesn't trigger a full reset mid-chord.

Wrong/missed chord name:
- chordFromNotes no longer assumes notes[0] is the root. Instead,
  Tonal.detect() is called on the full note set, then results are
  sorted to prefer root-position chords (no slash) over inversions
  and shorter quality names over complex ones. Falls back through
  subsets (5, 4, 3 notes) if the full set produces no match.

Phantom notes:
- Uniformity guard tightened 3.0→4.5× median.
- Chroma threshold raised 0.15→0.20.
- Stable notes capped at 6 (too many confuse detect()).

Sensitivity:
- STABLE_RATIO lowered 0.40→0.30 so a note appearing in just 2/6
  frames (brief or decaying strum) still qualifies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
